utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You still have not told Rachel you were not really proposing ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_You still have not told Rachel you were not really proposing ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No ! She had the ring on , she seemed so excited , and then she took her breast out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Joey , you have to tell her what going on ! And what did it look like ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I did not look at it . Stupid baby head was blocking most of it .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I did not look at it . Stupid baby head was blocking most of it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Go and tell Rachel right now before Ross finds out .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look , it is not that easy . She said she wanted to marry me . I do not want to hurt her .

emotion_cause.span: 6_it is not that easy . She said she wanted to marry me . I do not want to hurt her .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , look , just do it gently .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I ... I will go tell her now before Ross finds out and I will be gentle .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Two people screwing in there if you want to check that out .
